markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, demo a new tool, and address content feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** Aembit rejected the "Agentic AI" article for being a "reference document" lacking narrative flow. GrowthX will revise content artifacts to adopt a journalistic style, using Aembit's examples.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**New LLM Tracking Tool:** GrowthX demoed "Check That," a replacement for Scrunch. It offers more accurate reporting focused on evaluation-stage prompts (e.g., "best tool for X") and will be rolled out to Aembit with free access.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**QBR Postponed:** The Quarterly Business Review (QBR) is postponed two weeks due to Aembit's offsite. Next week's sync will be an async update.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Strategy

  - [**Feedback:** Aembit rejected the "Agentic AI" article for reading like a "reference document" with no narrative flow, harming the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [**Specific Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
          - [Repetitive, citation-heavy structure ("According to Gartner...").](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
          - [Generic, keyword-stuffed lead paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
          - [Lacked a unique perspective, feeling "entirely AI generated."](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**GrowthX Rationale:** The format was a test to compress deep research into a 2,000-word article, which resulted in a list of facts instead of a story.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will revise content artifacts to guide the AI toward a journalistic style ("bottom line up front"), using Aembit's examples.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

### New Tool: "Check That"

  - [**Purpose:** Replaces Scrunch for tracking LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Focus on Evaluation Stage:** Tracks prompts where purchase decisions are made (e.g., "best tool for X").](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Improved Accuracy:** Better at distinguishing brand mentions from generic terms.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Citations:** Shows which specific pages on Aembit's site are cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Rollout:** GrowthX will use it for reporting; Aembit gets free access (up to 1 year) within the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Blog Staging & Performance

  - [**Staging Feedback (from Aembit's designer):**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Featured Images:** Vary layouts and colors more to avoid visual repetition on the blog homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Excerpts:** Standardize to \~135 characters (3 lines) for a consistent layout.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [**Performance:** Numbers are improving. The "two-legged, three-legged OAuth" article remains the top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to update the Looker dashboard with new article URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Quarterly Business Review (QBR)

  - [**Purpose:** Review progress against performance goals and chart the path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Decision:** Postponed two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aembit's team offsite in Mexico City next week makes a live QBR impractical.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [**Next Week:** GrowthX will send an async update instead of the live sync.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aembit (Dan):**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Provide examples of well-written, long-form articles.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Review priority articles (rows 203-206 in the sheet) and glossary pages this week.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Carrie):**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [Schedule the QBR for two weeks from now.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Ehtisham):**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Revise content artifacts to adopt a journalistic style.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Implement blog staging feedback (image variety, excerpt length).](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard with new article URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Team):**](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [Send an async update next week in place of the live sync.](https://fathom.video/share/fzXXH2ydR98sRStgB7jy1R7MKUWjTgVE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
